case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. $1,237.45 US CURRENCY ET AL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $857.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY SCOTT SUGARMAN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT PAUL TEED. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $380.45 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT $1,237.45 US CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (OF PETITION) (TRANSACTION ID # 60747120) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
